src: Helping AI/ ML/ DataScience practitioners and enthusiasts to get their dream job. Some are completely Nepal-based whereas some operate outside of the Nepal. Some are specially known for AI / ML whereas some has started to adopt AI / ML
ja: AI・ML・データサイエンスの実践者や愛好者が理想の仕事を見つけるための支援。ネパール拠点のものもあれば海外展開しているものもあり、AI・MLに特化したものや最近AI・MLを取り入れ始めたものも含む
